title: bidens lejolyana
intro: Bidens lejolyana, also known as Lejoly's beggar-ticks, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Bidens lejolyana can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments.
